full_name: Kuwait Central Bank — Information Security Regulation (ISR)

controls.description: Financial institutions must establish a comprehensive information security governance framework with board oversight.
controls.logic: FAIL if no board_approved_is_policy exists, or if CISO role is vacant, or if security_governance_framework_reviewed_date older than 12 months.

controls.description: An annual risk assessment must be conducted covering all information assets and systems.
controls.logic: FAIL if risk_assessment_date is older than 12 months or if critical_systems are excluded from assessment scope.

controls.description: Multi-factor authentication must be enforced for access to critical banking and financial systems.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user with access to core_banking_system = TRUE has mfa_enabled = FALSE.

controls.description: Customer financial data must be encrypted at rest and in transit using approved cryptographic algorithms.
controls.logic: FAIL if any customer_financial_data record has encryption_enabled = FALSE, or if encryption_algorithm IN ('DES','3DES','RC4','MD5').

controls.description: Significant cybersecurity incidents must be reported to the Central Bank of Kuwait within prescribed timeframes.
controls.logic: FAIL if any major_incident has cbk_notification_sent = FALSE, or if notification_hours > 24 for critical incidents.

controls.requirement: Disaster Recovery and BCP Tested Annually
controls.description: Disaster recovery and business continuity plans must be documented, tested annually, and approved by management.
controls.logic: FAIL if drp_test_date older than 12 months, or if bcp_approval_date is NULL, or if last_drp_test_result = 'FAILED'.

controls.description: All third parties with access to customer data or critical systems must be security-assessed annually.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical_vendor has no security_assessment in the last 12 months, or if vendor_security_clauses_in_contract = FALSE.
